name: Suspicious Windows Command Shell Execution
description: Detects cmd.exe spawning with suspicious command-line arguments
query:
// Detect cmd.exe with encoded or obfuscated arguments
// Trigger on suspicious cmd patterns
events from edr_process
where exe_path matches "(?i)cmd\.exe$"
  and cmdline matches "(?i)(/c|/k).*(certutil|bitsadmin|wmic|net\s|reg\s|sc\s|schtasks)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 2
within 120 seconds
